stand_sites.description: Primary interception stand on travel corridor from bedding to feeding. Positioned to intercept mature bucks during dawn/dusk movement. Security: 50%. Thermal advantage: standard.

Thermal refuge transition stand. Mature bucks move to thermal comfort areas during midday. Positioned 80-200m from primary bedding. Thermal direction: neutral. Hunt this when bucks relocate for thermal comfort.

Perimeter escape route stand. Mature bucks flee to edges when pressured, not deeper into property. Positioned on property boundary/perimeter. Overall security: 50%. Hunt this during pressure periods (other hunters, weather fronts, rut activity).

feeding_sites.description: Best feeding area within 1500 feet (1003ft). Excellent food sources with 50% security. Primary food source for mature buck activity in this zone.
